appearance.facial_identity: soft oval face, narrow jawline, small tapered chin, large almond-shaped eyes, small nose, fair skin
appearance.skin: fair neutral skin tone with soft diffuse highlights and minimal shadow contrast

expression.emotion: completely relaxed and emotionally neutral, appearing quietly distracted by something above
expression.eyebrows: natural low resting position, soft gentle arch, no tension, brows separated normally with no furrowing
expression.eyelids: eyes moderately open, upper eyelids relaxed and slightly heavy, no widening or squinting
expression.eye_direction: both irises directed upward toward the upper left area of the frame
expression.lips: closed naturally with no visible separation
expression.mouth_detail: mouth corners remain level, lips lightly touching, no muscular engagement around the mouth
expression.jaw: jaw fully relaxed, teeth likely resting lightly together
expression.facial_muscles: entire face relaxed with no visible tension in brow, eyes, cheeks, or mouth
expression.overall_impression: a candid moment of quiet attention directed away from the viewer

gaze.direction: upward and slightly left of camera
gaze.quality: softly focused with very low muscle tension around the eyes
gaze.emotion: a gaze that feels mentally elsewhere, gently curious and quietly reflective rather than actively engaged
gaze.iris_alignment: both irises aligned and directed upward-left in the same direction
gaze.sclera_visibility: more sclera visible below the irises due to the upward gaze, minimal sclera visible above
gaze.gaze_body_alignment: head is tilted upward and turned slightly left; irises follow the same direction naturally and consistently

makeup.skin_base: light natural coverage or bare skin appearance with visible natural softness

eyes.eyeliner: very subtle upper lash definition or none

hair.color: deep black with subtle cool brown reflections in highlights
hair.overall_silhouette: long narrow silhouette with most volume concentrated around the head and upper length, tapering softly downward
hair.parting: soft off-center part slightly right of center
hair.layers: long face-framing layers beginning around the cheek and jaw area, blending into the overall length
hair.ends: soft lightly tapered ends with natural texture
hair.bangs: medium-density wispy fringe covering part of the forehead and ending around eyebrow level
hair.side_hair: long side sections fall forward along both sides of the face, partially framing the cheeks
hair.ear_visibility: right ear partially visible, left ear mostly covered
hair.hair_line: mostly obscured by fringe, visible portions appear soft and rounded
hair.volume: moderate natural volume around crown with flatter lengths
hair.texture: silky straight texture with smooth surface and visible individual strands
hair.flyaways: a few loose strands around the face and near the crown
hair.movement: mostly still with slight natural strand separation

background_rendering.focus: subject is the sole focal point

accessories.item: backpack straps and small ear piercings

pose.description: seated with legs extended forward toward the camera
pose.depth_direction: legs project strongly toward camera creating depth while torso remains relatively frontal
pose.legs: both knees bent and positioned toward camera, feet planted forward
pose.arms: arms relaxed beside the body inside oversized sleeves and outerwear
pose.hand_action: hands resting naturally with no active gesture
pose.upper_body: torso upright with slight backward lean
pose.head: head turned slightly left and tilted upward
pose.neck_anatomy: neck elongated naturally due to upward gaze but remains anatomically realistic
pose.shoulder_anatomy: shoulders relaxed and slightly rounded forward
pose.posture: comfortable and casual without visible tension
pose.overall_impression: an effortless candid seated pose with relaxed streetwear energy
pose.adjustment_rule: maintain natural neck alignment and realistic seated proportions over dramatic head rotation

lighting.source: broad soft source from upper front-left around 10 o'clock

skin_lighting_behavior.lit_side: skin receives soft neutral-white highlights with a slightly cool cast
skin_lighting_behavior.shadow_side: shadows remain very light and neutral with substantial fill light
skin_lighting_behavior.transition: extremely gradual and smooth light-to-shadow transition
skin_lighting_behavior.overall_skin_tone: skin tone varies subtly with lighting while remaining predominantly fair and neutral
avoid: flat evenly-lit skin with no directional shading
skin tone that does not respond to the light source color temperature

camera.angle: low angle looking upward from near foot level
camera.rule_of_thirds: centered composition, rule of thirds largely not applied
camera.negative_space: substantial empty space around the subject enhances isolation and simplicity

focus: forward perspective of legs and shoes

camera.style: clean fashion illustration translated into a realistic portrait setup

anatomy_and_proportion.head_size: head should remain proportional despite low-angle perspective
anatomy_and_proportion.neck: neck length should remain realistic and connected naturally to shoulders
anatomy_and_proportion.shoulder_width: moderately narrow and proportional to head size
anatomy_and_proportion.torso: torso should maintain natural length without compression
anatomy_and_proportion.arm_length: arms should extend naturally beneath oversized clothing
anatomy_and_proportion.hand_size: hands proportional to forearms and partially obscured by sleeves
anatomy_and_proportion.legs_and_hips: perspective enlargement of legs and shoes should remain believable and not exaggerated
anatomy_and_proportion.overall_body_proportions: full figure should preserve realistic human proportions despite wide-angle perspective
avoid: head too large or too small relative to body
neck that appears stretched, broken, or distorted
excessive perspective distortion of feet and legs
